case_title: HICKS, MICHAEL J., B-80852 VS NOLAN, THOMAS B., ESQ

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE OF NATHAN KLEINER, ROSEN, BIEN REQUESTING ATTACHMENT OF PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HICKS COMPLAINT.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN, THOMAS B., ESQ
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
AND HAS APPEARED IN SMALL CLAIMS ACTIONS ON BEHALF OF OTHERS NO MORE THAN TEN TIMES DURING THE CALEN- DAR YEAR. PLT'S MOTION FOR USE OF A TELEMONITOR IS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HICKS, MICHAEL J., B-80852 AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN, THOMAS B., ESQ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN, THOMAS B., ESQ CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-08-2005 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM MICHAEL HICKS RE REQUEST WHETHER SERVICE MADE ON DEFT AND FOR FORMS.
PLTFF'S DECLARATION(VIA MAIL):CHANGE OF ADDRESS;RE QUEST TO CONDUCT HRNG W/USE OF TELEMONITER LAND LI NE;POS BY MAIL,RE:MOTION.
CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM MICHAEL HICKS RE QUESTION ON SERVICE OF PROCESS ON DEFT.
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY MICHAEL HICKS REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE OF NOV 17TH HEARING.
CERT MAIL SENT TO THOMAS B. NOLAN-RETURNED SIGNED.
PER CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, SECTION 116.540(F), THE PLTF CAN EITHER: SUBMIT DECLARA- TIONS TO SERVE AS EVIDENCE SUPPORTING HIS OR HER
CLAIM, OR MAY AUTHORIZE ANOTHER INDIVIDUAL TO APPEAR AND PARTICIPATE ON HIS OR HER BEHALF IF THE INDIVIDUAL IS SERVING WITHOUT COMPENSATION
DENIED. PLTF'S MOTION FOR A HEARING HELD IN CHAMBERS IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-17-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-08-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. PLAINTIFF FILED A LATE REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. CASE CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL. DEFT OBJECTS TO THE CONTINUANCE.
